subject: Gaming
title: League of Legends: The MOBA Giant
description: A micro-lesson that makes League of Legends: The MOBA Giant usable.

hook.text: The League of Legends World Championship draws more viewers than the Super Bowl.

buildup.text: Riot Games launched LoL in 2009 as a free-to-play MOBA. Millions started playing within months.

discovery.text: Riot created its own league system with salaried players. Esports became a stable career for the first time.

twist.text: Franchised teams cost $10 million to buy in. Most lost money. The business model remains unproven.

climax.text: LoL Worlds 2022 peaked at over 5 million concurrent viewers. It's the world's most-watched esport.

punchline.text: More viewers than the Super Bowl. A free game became a global sport.

quiz.question: What did Riot Games pioneer for esports?
options: A franchised league system with salaried professional players
